name: Chunky Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine flour, powdered sugar, and cocoa in a bowl.
3. Add the vanilla and almond extracts.
4. Cut in the chilled butter until the mixture forms crumbly crumbs.
5. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom of a 9 by 13 inch pan.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Melt 1 cup of chocolate chips in the sweetened condensed milk over medium heat.
8. Stir in the remaining vanilla and almond extracts.
9. Pour the melted chocolate evenly over the crust.
10. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips and chopped pecans on top.
11. Press down firmly to ensure everything is covered.
12. Bake for an additional 20 minutes, then allow to cool completely before chilling and cutting into bars.
